name: PolyRobin
description: A safety-first prediction-market co-pilot for Polymarket and Robinhood Chain. Builds independent probability estimates, only surfaces real edges with transparent math, enforces 7 hard safety gates, and guides execution through BankrBot's existing rails — always on Robinhood Chain by default (never silently on Base). An analyst that guides execution, not a black-box trader.

demo.title: demo.sh
demo.code:
@bankrbot using the polyrobin skill, should I put $20 on the fight tonight? size it and show the math
# PolyRobin: finds the Polymarket market, builds an independent probability,
# shows edge + EV + conviction, checks all 7 safety gates, then asks you to
# confirm before @bankrbot places the bet.

setup: Optionally copy examples/config.yaml to ~/.polyrobin/config.yaml to tune your risk gates.
Talk to it: '@bankrbot using the polyrobin skill, find crypto markets resolving this week'.
PolyRobin routes non-bet actions (Morpho, swaps, bridging, tokenized stocks) on Robinhood Chain by default and always confirms before executing.
